clusters.excerpt: 57세의 이 남성은 나중에 비자 기간을 초과한 혐의로 체포되었으며 현재 캘리포니아의 ICE 처리 센터에 구금되어 있습니다.
clusters.excerpt_en: The 57-year-old was later arrested for overstaying his Visa and is currently detained at an ICE processing centre in California.

articles.title: Footage shows Australian man handcuffed by ICE agents in Las Vegas airport
Australian handcuffed by ICE in Las Vegas
